# The Diaspora App

> Premium discovery, events, blogs, and advertising for diaspora-owned businesses and global communities.

The Diaspora App is a curated marketplace and discovery platform connecting the global diaspora — starting with the African diaspora in the UAE — to authentic, vetted, diaspora-owned restaurants, salons, barbers, fashion houses, photographers, tailors, event organizers, and hiring businesses. The platform is mobile-first, mobile-and-web accessible, and runs on Firebase. Direct WhatsApp contact between members and businesses is the primary engagement model — there is zero marketplace commission on sellers.

## Operator
- Built and operated by NDN Analytics — https://www.ndnanalytics.com/
- Headquarters: Dubai, United Arab Emirates
- Contact: hello@diaspora.app

## Cities and markets
Active and rolling out: Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, London, Toronto, New York, Lagos, Nairobi, Paris, Accra, Johannesburg, Houston.

## Core sections

- [Homepage](https://www.thediaspora.app/): Premium landing with featured spotlights, search, categories, trending businesses, cities, editorial story, seller call-to-action.
- [Business Directory](https://www.thediaspora.app/feed.html): Filterable directory of diaspora-owned businesses by country, city, area, and category.
- [Blog](https://www.thediaspora.app/blog.html): Editorial articles on diaspora business growth, events, marketing, and SEO.
- [Events](https://www.thediaspora.app/events.html): Diaspora-led food weeks, beauty connects, markets, and community gatherings worldwide.
- [Pricing](https://www.thediaspora.app/pricing.html): Free, Pro, Enterprise, job-posting, and sponsored placement tiers.
- [About](https://www.thediaspora.app/about.html): Company background, mission, leadership, and trust commitments.
- [Contact](https://www.thediaspora.app/contact.html): Member support, seller onboarding, press inquiries.
- [Press](https://www.thediaspora.app/press.html): Press kit, founder photos, brand assets.
- [Careers](https://www.thediaspora.app/careers.html): Open roles at NDN Analytics and The Diaspora App.
- [Privacy](https://www.thediaspora.app/privacy.html), [Terms](https://www.thediaspora.app/terms.html), [Cookies](https://www.thediaspora.app/cookies.html): Legal.

- [How to Advertise a Diaspora Business](https://www.thediaspora.app/blog-diaspora-business-advertising.html)
- [How to Launch a Diaspora Event](https://www.thediaspora.app/blog-how-to-launch-diaspora-event.html)
- [Google-Ready Marketplace SEO](https://www.thediaspora.app/blog-google-ready-marketplace-seo.html)

- [Dubai Diaspora Market](https://www.thediaspora.app/event-dubai-diaspora-market.html)
- [London Food Week](https://www.thediaspora.app/event-london-food-week.html)
- [Toronto Beauty Connect](https://www.thediaspora.app/event-toronto-beauty-connect.html)

## Categories
Restaurants, Food Sellers, Hair Stylists, Barbers, Photographers, Jobs, Tailors & Fashion, Beauty & Makeup, Music & Events, Creatives.

## Crawl targets

- Sitemap index: https://www.thediaspora.app/sitemap.xml
- Pages sitemap: https://www.thediaspora.app/sitemap-pages.xml
- Blog sitemap: https://www.thediaspora.app/sitemap-blog.xml
- Events sitemap: https://www.thediaspora.app/sitemap-events.xml
- Image sitemap: https://www.thediaspora.app/sitemap-images.xml
- RSS feed: https://www.thediaspora.app/feed.xml
- Full LLM context: https://www.thediaspora.app/llms-full.txt
- Robots: https://www.thediaspora.app/robots.txt

## Crawler policy
Public marketplace, blog, and event pages are explicitly opted-in for AI search and LLM training. Authentication, profile, and seller dashboard pages are disallowed. See robots.txt for full directives covering GPTBot, OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User, ClaudeBot, anthropic-ai, Google-Extended, PerplexityBot, CCBot, cohere-ai, Meta-ExternalAgent, Applebot-Extended, Bytespider, Amazonbot, and others.

## Trust commitments
- Zero marketplace commission on diaspora businesses.
- Verified, vetted seller profiles.
- Direct WhatsApp contact — no middlemen between members and businesses.
- Community-first review and rating system.
- 100% diaspora-owned business showcase.
